    for name in ['xl/worksheets/sheet1.xml','xl/worksheets/sheet2.xml','xl/worksheets/sheet3.xml','xl/worksheets/sheet4.xml']:

        print(name, data.find('<sheetData>'))
PY

task: Advanced high-value task: Safety Plc Truth-Table Row Model Input Challenge. Scenario: a specialist reviewer found conflicting signals and needs an auditable explanation of which values matter for safety plc truth-table row. Embedded packet: Records: R1 guard_closed=56 estop_ok=87 curtain_clear=1; R2 guard_closed=65 estop_ok=83 curtain_clear=4; R3 guard_closed=51 estop_ok=98 curtain_clear=0. Remediation options: O1 changes guard_closed by -12% cost=84500; O2 changes estop_ok by -18% cost=100500; O3 changes curtain_clear by -25% cost=59500; max_budget=126000. Rules and constraints: run permission requires all three true; mismatch is safety critical; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: design the output schema and acceptance checks an automated agent would need to reproduce the analysis. Deliver safety_PLC_2.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
